description: Letter from Ismaʿīl b. Barhūn al-Tahartī (CUDL), Yosef b. Berekhya or Moshe b. Barhun al-Taharti, Qayrawān (PGP), to (Efrayim b.) Shemarya, Fustat. Discusses responsa of the geʾonim. Dating: ca. 1007–1055 CE, based on the years when Efrayim b. Shemarya was active, but this date range might be narrowed further based on the years when the potential senders were active/alive.
description_he: מכתב מאחד מאנשי משפחת אל-טאהרתי, קירואן, ל(אפרים בן) שמריה, פוסטאט. דן בתשובות הגאונים. כ-1007–1055.
